privileged_info_summary: The spreadsheet_cleanup task is a medium difficulty task with a 120-second timeout and 15-step maximum. It operates on a synthetic ODS file containing 51 rows: 4 junk rows at the top, 1 header row with 5 columns (Name, Email, Registration Date, Ticket Type, Dietary Restrictions), and 46 data rows of synthetic attendee information. All columns are initially set to 0.7in width (narrow), headers are plain text without bold formatting, and no freeze panes are configured. The data includes 46 unique names generated from fixed lists, email addresses following firstname.lastname@email.com pattern, dates in 2024-01-XX format, 5 ticket types (General Admission, VIP, Early Bird, Student, Group), and 8 dietary restrictions (None, Vegetarian, Vegan, Gluten-Free, Nut Allergy, Dairy-Free, Kosher, Halal). One discrepancy was found: the README claims row 4 contains 'Total Registrations: 47' but the actual file contains 'Total Registrations: 46', which correctly reflects the 46 data rows in the file.
